events.new: SCENARIO( "Vector resizing affects size and capacity", "[vector][bdd][size][capacity]" ) { GIVEN( "an empty vector" ) { std::vector<int> v; REQUIRE( v.size() == 0 ); WHEN( "it is made larger" ) { v.resize( 10 ); THEN( "the size and capacity go up" ) { REQUIRE( v.size() == 10 ); REQUIRE( v.capacity() >= 10 ); AND_WHEN( "it is made smaller again" ) { v.resize( 5 ); THEN( "the size goes down but the capacity stays the same" ) { REQUIRE( v.size() == 5 ); REQUIRE( v.capacity() >= 10 ); } } } } WHEN( "we reserve more space" ) { v.reserve( 10 ); THEN( "The capacity is increased but the size remains the same" ) { REQUIRE( v.capacity() >= 10 ); REQUIRE( v.size() == 0 ); } } } } SCENARIO( "This is a really long scenario name to see how the list command deals with wrapping", "[very long tags][lots][long][tags][verbose]" ) { }
